BRANCH.COMMENT: check the size of select adapter output

MAP.COMMENT: get the date difference -VE-836 changes start date
divide the target value by days in a week
multiply the result with date difference
get the end date of month-VE-836 changes start date
divide the target value by days in a week
multiply the result with date difference

MAP.COMMENT: --- set Period Target Value to Prorated Value ---
get the date difference -VE-836 changes start date
--- VE-1291 changed precision value to 3 --- divide the target value by days in a week
--- VE-1291 changed to precision value of 2 --- multiply the result with date difference
get the end date of month-VE-836 changes start date
divide the target value by days in a week
multiply the result with date difference
